MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Fred Doughty.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Tony White is present.
Attorney Matthew Show representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of May 13, 2013 vacated. (501/AJR)
